name: lean-ctx
description: Context Runtime for AI Agents — 69 MCP tools, 10 read modes, 60+ shell patterns, tree-sitter AST for 18 languages. Compresses LLM context by up to 99%. Use when reading files, running shell commands, searching code, or exploring directories. Auto-installs if not present.
author: yvgude
summary_zh: 给 AI 智能体用的上下文运行时，通过多种读取模式、shell 模式匹配和语法树解析，把传给大模型的上下文体积压缩到极致，适合需要频繁读文件、跑命令、搜代码或翻目录的场景。
